message:
fix(messaging/jetstream): prevent double-ack on JetStream messages

ack(), nack(), and term() did not check the acked flag before
publishing to the broker. Sequential calls could send contradictory
acknowledgments (+ACK then -NAK), violating exactly-once semantics.

Fixed with atomic swap gate: first caller wins, subsequent callers
get Err(JsError::AlreadyAcknowledged). in_progress() is exempt as
it only extends the ack deadline without resolving the message.

Also records 4-file distributed/messaging audit.
Session total: 99 files, 7 bugs fixed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
